obligation: A pre-protocol evidence packet has been reviewed.
Primary and exploratory analysis boundaries are recorded.
Redesign triggers and approval thresholds are explicit.
control: Fail closed if the study question is still ambiguous.
Fail closed if the evidence packet is missing.
Fail closed if the primary analysis boundary is not locked.
Reroute to approval instead of silently changing the study design.
mechanism_formation_notes: Compile the protocol-lock boundary into gate-aware checks that require explicit evidence, explicit lock records, and approval-aware rerouting before the project can move forward.
